# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for datastore security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: datastore_security

---
# Elasticsearch Snapshot Configuration with Security Best Practices

# Configuration Variables
elasticsearch:
  host: "${ES_HOST:localhost}"
  port: "${ES_PORT:9200}"
  protocol: "${ES_PROTOCOL:https}"
  username: "${ES_USERNAME}"
  password: "${ES_PASSWORD}"
  api_key: "${ES_API_KEY}"
  use_api_key: "${ES_USE_API_KEY:true}"
  ssl_verify: "${ES_SSL_VERIFY:true}"
  ssl_ca_cert: "${ES_SSL_CA_CERT:/etc/elasticsearch/certs/ca.crt}"
  connection_timeout: 30
  request_timeout: 300

# S3 Repository Configuration (Secure)
s3_repository:
  name: "s3_backup_repository"
  type: "s3"
  settings:
    bucket: "${S3_BUCKET_NAME}"
    region: "${AWS_REGION:us-east-1}"
    base_path: "elasticsearch/snapshots"
    compress: true
    server_side_encryption: true
    storage_class: "STANDARD_IA"
    max_retries: 3
    use_throttle_retries: true
    # Use IAM roles instead of access keys when possible
    # If access keys must be used, store in secure keystore
    client: "default"
    # Access credentials should be configured via elasticsearch-keystore
    # aws.client.default.access_key: STORED_IN_KEYSTORE
    # aws.client.default.secret_key: STORED_IN_KEYSTORE
    # aws.client.default.session_token: STORED_IN_KEYSTORE
    readonly: false
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "100mb"
    max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "100mb"

# File Share Repository Configuration (Secure)
file_repository:
  name: "file_backup_repository"
  type: "fs"
  settings:
    location: "${SNAPSHOT_LOCATION:/mnt/elasticsearch/backups}"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "100mb"
    max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "100mb"
    readonly: false
    # Ensure proper file permissions (750 or 700)
    # Owner: elasticsearch user, Group: elasticsearch group

# Azure Blob Storage Repository Configuration (Secure)
azure_repository:
  name: "azure_backup_repository"
  type: "azure"
  settings:
    container: "${AZURE_CONTAINER_NAME}"
    base_path: "elasticsearch/snapshots"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    readonly: false
    # Credentials stored in elasticsearch-keystore
    # azure.client.default.account: STORED_IN_KEYSTORE
    # azure.client.default.key: STORED_IN_KEYSTORE
    # Or use managed identity
    client: "default"

# GCS Repository Configuration (Secure)
gcs_repository:
  name: "gcs_backup_repository"
  type: "gcs"
  settings:
    bucket: "${GCS_BUCKET_NAME}"
    base_path: "elasticsearch/snapshots"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    readonly: false
    # Use service account with minimal permissions
    # Credentials file stored securely with restricted permissions (400)
    client: "default"
    # gcs.client.default.credentials_file: /etc/elasticsearch/gcs-credentials.json

# Snapshot Policies (Automated Backups)
snapshot_policies:
  - name: "daily_snapshot_policy"
    schedule: "0 2 * * *"  # Daily at 2 AM
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices: ["*"]
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "automated_policy"
        taken_because: "daily_backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "30d"
      min_count: 7
      max_count: 90
    
  - name: "weekly_snapshot_policy"
    schedule: "0 3 * * 0"  # Weekly on Sunday at 3 AM
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices: ["*"]
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "automated_policy"
        taken_because: "weekly_backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "90d"
      min_count: 4
      max_count: 52

  - name: "monthly_snapshot_policy"
    schedule: "0 4 1 * *"  # Monthly on 1st at 4 AM
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices: ["*"]
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "automated_policy"
        taken_because: "monthly_backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "365d"
      min_count: 12
      max_count: 24

# Manual Snapshot Configuration
manual_snapshot:
  repository: "s3_backup_repository"
  snapshot_name_prefix: "manual_snapshot"
  indices: ["*"]
  ignore_unavailable: true
  include_global_state: true
  partial: false
  wait_for_completion: false
  metadata:
    taken_by: "operations_team"

# Restore Configuration
restore_config:
  indices: ["*"]
  ignore_unavailable: true
  include_global_state: false
  include_aliases: true
  partial: false
  rename_pattern: "(.+)"
  rename_replacement: "restored_$1"
  index_settings:
    index.number_of_replicas: 1
  ignore_index_settings:
    - "index.refresh_interval"

# Security Settings
security:
  # Role-Based Access Control
  roles:
    snapshot_admin:
      cluster:
        - "manage_slm"
        - "cluster:admin/snapshot/*"
        - "cluster:admin/repository/*"
      indices:
        - names: ["*"]
          privileges: ["all"]
    
    snapshot_operator:
      cluster:
        - "cluster:admin/snapshot/create"
        - "cluster:admin/snapshot/get"
        - "cluster:admin/snapshot/status"
        - "read_slm"
      indices:
        - names: ["*"]
          privileges: ["read"]
    
    snapshot_viewer:
      cluster:
        - "cluster:admin/snapshot/get"
        - "cluster:admin/snapshot/status"
        - "cluster:admin/repository/get"
        - "read_slm"
      indices:
        - names: ["*"]
          privileges: ["read"]

  # Audit Logging
  audit:
    enabled: true
    log_snapshot_operations: true
    log_restore_operations: true
    outputs:
      - type: "logfile"
        path: "/var/log/elasticsearch/audit.log"
      - type: "index"
        index: "audit-log"

  # Network Security
  network:
    bind_host: "0.0.0.0"
    publish_host: "${ES_PUBLISH_HOST}"
    ssl_enabled: true
    ssl_verification_mode: "full"
    ssl_certificate: "/etc/elasticsearch/certs/node.crt"
    ssl_key: "/etc/elasticsearch/certs/node.key"
    ssl_certificate_authorities: ["/etc/elasticsearch/certs/ca.crt"]

  # Authentication
  authentication:
    enabled: true
    type: "native"  # or "ldap", "saml", "oidc"
    api_key_enabled: true
    token_service_enabled: true

  # Encryption at Rest
  encryption:
    enabled: true
    # Ensure underlying storage is encrypted
    # S3: Use SSE-S3, SSE-KMS, or SSE-C
    # Azure: Use Azure Storage Service Encryption
    # GCS: Use Google-managed or customer-managed encryption keys
    # File: Use LUKS or similar disk encryption

# Monitoring and Alerting
monitoring:
  enabled: true
  snapshot_status_check_interval: "5m"
  alerts:
    - name: "snapshot_failure"
      condition: "snapshot.state == 'FAILED'"
      severity: "high"
      notification_channels: ["email", "slack"]
    
    - name: "snapshot_duration_exceeded"
      condition: "snapshot.duration > 3600"
      severity: "medium"
      notification_channels: ["email"]
    
    - name: "repository_unavailable"
      condition: "repository.status == 'unavailable'"
      severity: "critical"
      notification_channels: ["email", "slack", "pagerduty"]

# Backup Verification
verification:
  enabled: true
  schedule: "0 6 * * *"  # Daily at 6 AM
  test_restore: true
  test_indices: ["test_restore_index"]
  cleanup_after_test: true

# Retention and Cleanup
retention:
  auto_cleanup_enabled: true
  cleanup_schedule: "0 5 * * *"  # Daily at 5 AM
  keep_minimum_snapshots: 7
  delete_expired_snapshots: true

# Path Configuration (Secure)
paths:
  repo_path: "${SNAPSHOT_LOCATION:/mnt/elasticsearch/backups}"
  # Ensure directory permissions: 750 or 700
  # Owner: elasticsearch, Group: elasticsearch
  # No world-readable permissions
  logs: "/var/log/elasticsearch"
  # Log file permissions: 640
  # Owner: elasticsearch, Group: elasticsearch

# Environment-Specific Configurations
environments:
  production:
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    snapshot_frequency: "daily"
    retention_days: 90
    encryption_required: true
    
  staging:
    repository: "file_backup_repository"
    snapshot_frequency: "weekly"
    retention_days: 30
    encryption_required: true
    
  development:
    repository: "file_backup_repository"
    snapshot_frequency: "weekly"
    retention_days: 14
    encryption_required: false

# Disaster Recovery
disaster_recovery:
  cross_region_replication: true
  secondary_repository:
    name: "s3_dr_repository"
    type: "s3"
    settings:
      bucket: "${S3_DR_BUCKET_NAME}"
      region: "${AWS_DR_REGION:us-west-2}"
      base_path: "elasticsearch/dr_snapshots"
      compress: true
      server_side_encryption: true
  
  rpo_target: "24h"  # Recovery Point Objective
  rto_target: "4h"   # Recovery Time Objective

# Compliance and Data Governance
compliance:
  data_classification: "confidential"
  retention_policy: "comply_with_gdpr"
  encryption_at_rest: true
  encryption_in_transit: true
  access_logging: true
  immutable_snapshots: false  # Set to true for compliance requirements
  legal_hold: false

# Operations Team Access
operations:
  team_roles:
    - username: "${OPS_ADMIN_USER}"
      role: "snapshot_admin"
    - username: "${OPS_OPERATOR_USER}"
      role: "snapshot_operator"
    - username: "${OPS_VIEWER_USER}"
      role: "snapshot_viewer"
  
  access_restrictions:
    ip_whitelist:
      - "${OPS_NETWORK_CIDR}"
    time_based_access: false
    mfa_required: true

# Notification Configuration
notifications:
  email:
    enabled: true
    smtp_host: "${SMTP_HOST}"
    smtp_port: "${SMTP_PORT:587}"
    smtp_user: "${SMTP_USER}"
    smtp_password: "${SMTP_PASSWORD}"
    from_address: "elasticsearch-backups@company.com"
    to_addresses:
      - "ops-team@company.com"
    use_tls: true
  
  slack:
    enabled: true
    webhook_url: "${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}"
    channel: "#elasticsearch-alerts"
  
  pagerduty:
    enabled: true
    integration_key: "${PAGERDUTY_INTEGRATION_KEY}"

# Health Checks
health_checks:
  repository_health:
    enabled: true
    interval: "15m"
    timeout: "30s"
  
  snapshot_integrity:
    enabled: true
    interval: "1d"
    verify_checksums: true
  
  storage_capacity:
    enabled: true
    interval: "1h"
    warning_threshold: "80%"
    critical_threshold: "90%"
